scenarios.title: Protein Structure Prediction and Design Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Protein structure prediction from amino-acid FASTA sequences, OmegaFold CLI or Python API usage, de novo structure prediction outputs, PDB confidence interpretation, and sequence-to-structure inference troubleshooting.
scenarios.role: Use omega-fold for OmegaFold-specific FASTA-to-PDB inference, CLI command construction, FASTA/PDB handling, model config/API inspection, and dependency/backend troubleshooting.
scenarios.read_when: The task names OmegaFold or omegafold, asks for de novo protein structure prediction from primary sequence, uses FASTA input to generate PDB output, mentions OmegaFold model 1 or model 2 weights, references --subbatch_size/--num_cycle/--weights_file, needs pLDDT-like confidence in PDB B-factors, or needs APIs such as make_config, OmegaFold.forward, pipeline.fasta2inputs, or pipeline.save_pdb.
scenarios.best_for: OmegaFold command-line inference, no-download CLI and API smoke checks, choosing model/device/resource flags, validating FASTA records before prediction, interpreting one-PDB-per-sequence outputs and confidence B-factors, and using OmegaFold's Python model/config/pipeline helpers.
scenarios.avoid_when: Use a different protein-structure skill for AlphaFold, ColabFold, Boltz, Chai-1, ESMFold, ProteinMPNN, RFdiffusion, binder design, sequence design, MSA generation outside OmegaFold, training/fine-tuning, or general PDB editing unrelated to OmegaFold outputs.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose omega-fold when the package or workflow is OmegaFold-specific, especially for FASTA-to-PDB inference, OmegaFold release weights, omegafold CLI flags, pipeline.fasta2inputs/save_pdb behavior, or OmegaFold Torch dependency issues. Choose another protein-structure skill when the request centers on another model family, protein design, MSA tooling, or training workflows.
